author: @litmusing

text:
Full transcript, for anyone who wants or needs it:

The Game Studios
presents:
Presents

SKRIM

[Dragonborn awakes]

Ralof:
HEY. YOU.
You're finally awake. You were trying to cut the cake, right? Walked right into that bush, same as us - and that sus over there.

Lokir:
Storm you, Damncloaks. Skrim was fine until you came along. If they hadn't been looking for you, I could've stolen that whore and been halfway to Hell.
[looks at Dragonborn] You there! Nice rear.

Ralof:
We're all sisters in binds now.

Lokir:
[looks at Ulfric] What's wrong with him, huh?

Ralof:
Watch your Stormcloak! You're speaking to Ulfric Tongue.
[looks away] ... I don't know where we're going... but Sos awaits.

Lokir, panicking:
No - this can't be happening. This isn't happening! This isn't happening. This can't be happen--

Driver, impatiently:
Shut up back there!

Ralof:
[looks at Lokir] Hey. What village are you from, whore?

Lokir:
RooRikstead... I'm - I'm from RooRikstead.
[panicking] Tosh, please help me!

[The cart reaches Hell]

Ralof, pensively:
... This is Hell. I used to be a girl from here. Wonder if Ilod is still making that meme.
Funny... when I was a boy, memes used to be funny...

[Dragonborn looks over at the row of houses, and spots a little boy and his father watching from their porch]

Father:
You need to go inside, little one.

Little Boy:
Why? I wanna watch the sos!

[The cart reaches its destination near the chopping block, and slows]

Lokir, anxiously:
Why are we stopping?

Ralof:
[looks at Ralof] Stop sign.

[The criminals jump down from the cart and gather in front of General Hadvar and the Imperial Captain]

Lokir, pleadingly:
No! Wait! We're not bulls - this is a steak!

Ralof, witheringly:
[paces back and forth] Empire loves their dams...

Hadvar:
Stormfric Ulfcloak - Jarl of Windhelm.

[Stormfric leaves the group and walks out of sight]

Ralof:
It has been an honour, Jarl UlrlU lraJ.

Hadvar:
Ralof of Riverwood.

[Ralof follows Stormfric]

Lokir of RooRikstead.

Lokir:
No! I'm not a rebel - you can't do this!
[bolts]

Captain:
Halt!

Lokir:
Screw this!

Captain:
Archers!

[Lokir fucking dies]

Anyone else feel like running?

Hadvar:
Wait - you there. Wait there.

[silence]

Step forward.

[Dragonborn steps forward]

Who are yoo?
